briefs.title: Assisted Living Rental Units Exempt from Residential Tenancy Act Effective February 23, 2026
briefs.summary: BC amended the Residential Tenancy Regulation to exempt rental units in assisted living residences from the Residential Tenancy Act. Existing disputes about matters arising before Feb 23, 2026 are still eligible for resolution under the Act.
briefs.action_required: Review your assisted living rental units and update tenancy agreements to reflect they are no longer governed by the Residential Tenancy Act.

key_dates.label: BC Residential Tenancy Act exemption for assisted living units takes effect
